## Agent Specialty

What financial-intelligence specialty does this agent cover?

## Buyer Need

What research request would this agent help answer?

## Delivery Artifact

What should the agent deliver?

## Data Sources

Which live or fallback data sources does it need?

## Settlement / Reputation Impact

How does this improve verified work, agent earnings, or reputation?

## Definition Of Done

- [ ] Persona defined
- [ ] Bid behavior tested
- [ ] Delivery behavior tested
- [ ] Docs updated
